Keywords: vpc, network, cidr, cloud, foundation
Description: Virtual Private Cloud - foundation for AWS networking
Best Practices: Enable DNS hostnames for private DNS, use /16 or /20 CIDR for flexibility
Common Mistakes: Using too small CIDR block, not enabling DNS support
Example Code: resource "aws_vpc" "main" { cidr_block = "10.0.0.0/16" enable_dns_hostnames = true tags = { Name = "main-vpc" } }

Keywords: subnet, network, availability, zone, public, private
Description: Subnet within a VPC for resource isolation
Best Practices: Create subnets in multiple AZs, separate public/private subnets
Common Mistakes: All subnets in single AZ, overlapping CIDR blocks
Example Code: resource "aws_subnet" "public" { vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id cidr_block = "10.0.1.0/24" availability_zone = "us-east-1a" map_public_ip_on_launch = true }

Keywords: security, group, firewall, ingress, egress, rules
Best Practices: Use separate SGs per service, restrict ingress to required ports only
Common Mistakes: Opening 0.0.0.0/0 to all ports, not setting egress rules
Example Code: resource "aws_security_group" "web" { vpc_id = aws_vpc.main.id ingress { from_port = 443 to_port = 443 protocol = "tcp" cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] } }

Keywords: ec2, instance, server, compute, virtual, machine
Optional Arguments: key_name, vpc_security_group_ids, subnet_id, user_data, iam_instance_profile, tags
Best Practices: Use launch templates instead, enable detailed monitoring, use IMDSv2
Common Mistakes: Hardcoding AMI IDs, not using IAM roles, public IPs on private instances
Example Code: resource "aws_instance" "web" { ami = data.aws_ami.ubuntu.id instance_type = "t3.micro" subnet_id = aws_subnet.private.id vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.web.id] }

Keywords: s3, bucket, storage, object, files, static
Best Practices: Enable versioning, encryption, block public access by default
Common Mistakes: Public buckets, no encryption, no lifecycle rules
Example Code: resource "aws_s3_bucket" "data" { bucket = "my-unique-bucket-name" } resource "aws_s3_bucket_versioning" "data" { bucket = aws_s3_bucket.data.id versioning_configuration { status = "Enabled" } }

Keywords: rds, database, mysql, postgres, sql, managed
Best Practices: Enable multi-AZ, encryption, automated backups, use secrets manager for credentials
Common Mistakes: Storing passwords in state, single AZ, no encryption
Example Code: resource "aws_rds_instance" "db" { allocated_storage = 20 engine = "postgres" engine_version = "15" instance_class = "db.t3.micro" db_name = "mydb" username = "admin" password = var.db_password multi_az = true storage_encrypted = true }

Keywords: lambda, function, serverless, event, code
Optional Arguments: filename, s3_bucket, s3_key, environment, timeout, memory_size, vpc_config
Best Practices: Use environment variables, set appropriate timeout/memory, use layers for dependencies
Common Mistakes: Too long timeout, not handling cold starts, no error handling
Example Code: resource "aws_lambda_function" "api" { function_name = "api-handler" role = aws_iam_role.lambda.arn handler = "index.handler" runtime = "nodejs18.x" filename = data.archive_file.lambda.output_path }

Keywords: iam, role, permission, policy, security, identity
Description: IAM role for AWS service access
Best Practices: Use least privilege, prefer managed policies, enable MFA for sensitive roles
Common Mistakes: Too permissive policies, not using conditions, inline policies
Example Code: resource "aws_iam_role" "lambda" { name = "lambda-execution-role" assume_role_policy = jsonencode({ Version = "2012-10-17" Statement = [{ Action = "sts:AssumeRole" Effect = "Allow" Principal = { Service = "lambda.amazonaws.com" } }] }) }

Keywords: eks, kubernetes, k8s, container, orchestration, managed
Best Practices: Enable logging, use managed node groups, enable secrets encryption
Common Mistakes: Not enabling logging, manual node management, public endpoint without restrictions
Example Code: resource "aws_eks_cluster" "main" { name = "my-cluster" role_arn = aws_iam_role.eks_cluster.arn vpc_config { subnet_ids = aws_subnet.private[*].id endpoint_private_access = true } }

Keywords: alb, nlb, load, balancer, elb, traffic, distribution
Best Practices: Use ALB for HTTP, NLB for TCP/UDP, enable access logs, use WAF with ALB
Common Mistakes: Wrong LB type, no health checks, missing access logs
Example Code: resource "aws_lb" "main" { name = "main-alb" load_balancer_type = "application" security_groups = [aws_security_group.alb.id] subnets = aws_subnet.public[*].id enable_deletion_protection = true }

Keywords: cloudfront, cdn, distribution, cache, edge, global
Best Practices: Use OAI for S3, enable WAF, configure proper cache behaviors
Common Mistakes: Not using OAI, wrong cache settings, no custom error responses
Example Code: resource "aws_cloudfront_distribution" "cdn" { origin { domain_name = aws_s3_bucket.static.bucket_regional_domain_name origin_id = "S3Origin" s3_origin_config { origin_access_identity = aws_cloudfront_origin_access_identity.oai.cloudfront_access_identity_path } } enabled = true default_cache_behavior { allowed_methods = ["GET", "HEAD"] cached_methods = ["GET", "HEAD"] target_origin_id = "S3Origin" viewer_protocol_policy = "redirect-to-https" } }

Keywords: route53, dns, zone, domain, hosted
Best Practices: Use alias records for AWS resources, enable DNSSEC, set appropriate TTLs
Common Mistakes: Wrong record types, missing health checks, no DNSSEC
Example Code: resource "aws_route53_zone" "main" { name = "example.com" }

Keywords: dynamodb, nosql, serverless, table, key-value
Optional Arguments: range_key, attribute, global_secondary_index, ttl, point_in_time_recovery, server_side_encryption
Best Practices: Enable point-in-time recovery, use on-demand for variable workloads, design for access patterns
Common Mistakes: Wrong partition key design, not enabling backups, over-provisioning
Example Code: resource "aws_dynamodb_table" "data" { name = "my-table" billing_mode = "PAY_PER_REQUEST" hash_key = "pk" range_key = "sk" attribute { name = "pk" type = "S" } attribute { name = "sk" type = "S" } point_in_time_recovery { enabled = true } }

Keywords: sqs, queue, messaging, async, decoupling
Description: Simple Queue Service for message queuing
Optional Arguments: delay_seconds, max_message_size, message_retention_seconds, visibility_timeout_seconds, sqs_managed_sse_enabled, dead_letter_queue
Best Practices: Enable encryption, configure DLQ, set appropriate visibility timeout
Common Mistakes: No DLQ, wrong visibility timeout, no encryption
Example Code: resource "aws_sqs_queue" "main" { name = "my-queue" sqs_managed_sse_enabled = true visibility_timeout_seconds = 30 redrive_policy = jsonencode({ deadLetterTargetArn = aws_sqs_queue.dlq.arn maxReceiveCount = 3 }) }

Keywords: sns, topic, pub, sub, notification, events
Best Practices: Enable encryption, use topic policies, configure delivery retries
Common Mistakes: No encryption, missing subscriptions, wrong protocol
Example Code: resource "aws_sns_topic" "alerts" { name = "alerts" kms_master_key_id = aws_kms_key.sns.id }

Keywords: resource, group, azure, container, organization
Best Practices: Use consistent naming, one RG per application/environment, add tags
Common Mistakes: Too many resources in one RG, wrong location, no tags
Example Code: resource "azurerm_resource_group" "main" { name = "my-rg" location = "eastus" tags = { Environment = "production" } }

Keywords: vnet, network, azure, virtual, cidr
Best Practices: Plan address space carefully, use network security groups, enable DDoS protection
Common Mistakes: Overlapping address spaces, no NSGs, missing peering
Example Code: resource "azurerm_virtual_network" "main" { name = "main-vnet" location = azurerm_resource_group.main.location resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name address_space = ["10.0.0.0/16"] }

Keywords: aks, kubernetes, k8s, azure, container, managed
Required Arguments: name, location, resource_group_name, dns_prefix, default_node_pool, identity
Best Practices: Enable RBAC, use managed identity, configure network policies
Common Mistakes: Public API server, no RBAC, wrong network plugin
Example Code: resource "azurerm_kubernetes_cluster" "main" { name = "my-aks" location = azurerm_resource_group.main.location resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name dns_prefix = "myaks" default_node_pool { name = "default" node_count = 3 vm_size = "Standard_D2_v2" } identity { type = "SystemAssigned" } }

Keywords: storage, blob, azure, files, queue, table
Best Practices: Enable HTTPS only, configure network rules, use appropriate replication
Common Mistakes: Public access, no encryption, wrong replication type
Example Code: resource "azurerm_storage_account" "main" { name = "mystorageaccount" resource_group_name = azurerm_resource_group.main.name location = azurerm_resource_group.main.location account_tier = "Standard" account_replication_type = "GRS" min_tls_version = "TLS1_2" enable_https_traffic_only = true }

Keywords: gce, instance, vm, compute, google, gcp
Best Practices: Use instance templates, enable shielded VM, use service accounts
Common Mistakes: Public IPs on private instances, default service account, no labels
Example Code: resource "google_compute_instance" "main" { name = "my-instance" machine_type = "e2-medium" zone = "us-central1-a" boot_disk { initialize_params { image = "debian-cloud/debian-11" } } network_interface { network = google_compute_network.vpc.id subnetwork = google_compute_subnetwork.subnet.id } }

Keywords: gke, kubernetes, k8s, google, container, managed
Optional Arguments: initial_node_count, node_config, network, subnetwork, private_cluster_config, workload_identity_config
Best Practices: Use private clusters, enable workload identity, configure network policies
Common Mistakes: Public clusters, default service account, no network policies
Example Code: resource "google_container_cluster" "main" { name = "my-gke" location = "us-central1" initial_node_count = 1 remove_default_node_pool = true workload_identity_config { workload_pool = "${var.project_id}.svc.id.goog" } private_cluster_config { enable_private_nodes = true enable_private_endpoint = false master_ipv4_cidr_block = "10.16.0.0/28" } }

Keywords: gcs, bucket, storage, object, google, gcp
Best Practices: Enable uniform bucket-level access, use appropriate storage class, set lifecycle rules
Common Mistakes: Public buckets, no versioning, wrong storage class
Example Code: resource "google_storage_bucket" "data" { name = "my-unique-bucket" location = "US" storage_class = "STANDARD" uniform_bucket_level_access = true versioning { enabled = true } }

Keywords: deployment, pods, replicas, k8s, container, app
Best Practices: Use resource limits, configure liveness/readiness probes, use PodDisruptionBudget
Common Mistakes: No resource limits, missing probes, no anti-affinity
Example Code: resource "kubernetes_deployment" "app" { metadata { name = "my-app" labels = { app = "my-app" } } spec { replicas = 3 selector { match_labels = { app = "my-app" } } template { metadata { labels = { app = "my-app" } } spec { container { name = "app" image = "nginx:latest" resources { limits = { cpu = "500m" memory = "128Mi" } } } } } } }

Keywords: service, loadbalancer, clusterip, nodeport, k8s
Best Practices: Use ClusterIP for internal, LoadBalancer sparingly, prefer Ingress
Common Mistakes: Wrong service type, missing selectors, no session affinity when needed
Example Code: resource "kubernetes_service" "app" { metadata { name = "my-app" } spec { selector = { app = "my-app" } port { port = 80 target_port = 8080 } type = "ClusterIP" } }

Keywords: configmap, config, k8s, settings, environment
Best Practices: Separate configs by environment, use for non-sensitive data only
Common Mistakes: Storing secrets in configmaps, too large configs, tight coupling
Example Code: resource "kubernetes_config_map" "app" { metadata { name = "app-config" } data = { DATABASE_HOST = "db.example.com" LOG_LEVEL = "info" } }

Keywords: secret, credentials, k8s, sensitive, password
Best Practices: Use external secrets operator, encrypt etcd, rotate regularly
Common Mistakes: Plain text in VCS, no encryption at rest, sharing across namespaces
Example Code: resource "kubernetes_secret" "db" { metadata { name = "db-credentials" } data = { username = base64encode(var.db_username) password = base64encode(var.db_password) } }

Keywords: namespace, isolation, k8s, multi-tenant, organization
Best Practices: Use namespaces for environment/team isolation, set resource quotas, configure network policies
Common Mistakes: Single namespace for everything, no quotas, no network policies
Example Code: resource "kubernetes_namespace" "app" { metadata { name = "my-app" labels = { environment = "production" } } }

Keywords: helm, chart, release, k8s, package, deployment
Best Practices: Pin chart versions, use values files, namespace isolation
Common Mistakes: Unpinned versions, no namespace, inline values
Example Code: resource "helm_release" "nginx" { name = "nginx-ingress" repository = "https://kubernetes.github.io/ingress-nginx" chart = "ingress-nginx" version = "4.0.0" namespace = "ingress-nginx" create_namespace = true values = [file("values.yaml")] }

Keywords: kms, encryption, key, security, crypto
Best Practices: Enable key rotation, use key policies, set deletion window
Common Mistakes: No rotation, too permissive policy, immediate deletion
Example Code: resource "aws_kms_key" "main" { description = "Main encryption key" deletion_window_in_days = 30 enable_key_rotation = true }

Keywords: secrets, manager, credentials, sensitive, vault
Best Practices: Enable rotation, use KMS encryption, set recovery window
Common Mistakes: No rotation, storing in plain text, no versioning
Example Code: resource "aws_secretsmanager_secret" "db" { name = "db-credentials" kms_key_id = aws_kms_key.main.id recovery_window_in_days = 30 }
